subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto those who have been illumined by the lights of the Countenance and who have been drawn unto the signs of God, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی الذین استضائوا من انوار الوجه و انجذبوا من آیات الله العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @life and death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
